ignoreCommand: git log -1 --pretty=%B | grep -q '\[skip ci\]' && exit 0 || exit 1

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com https://api.electricitymap.org https://api.anthropic.com https://ipapi.co https://www.googleapis.com https://*.supabase.co; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
